Quickstart
==========

This page explains how to compile and run a minimal LePIC simulation.

Build
-----

.. code-block:: bash

   mkdir build
   cd build

   cmake ..
   make -j

Run
---

Run the executable:

.. code-block:: bash

   ./run_min

Outputs
-------

Simulation outputs are written to:

.. code-block:: text

   Output/
   Output/Output_2D/

Visualization
-------------

Python plotting scripts are available in:

.. code-block:: text

   Plot/
